description: Due to a facility emergency, you must immediately close the 'Customer Service Queue' (CS_QUEUE). Create a new Call Time ID 'FORCE_CLOSE' (Name: 'Emergency Force Close') configured to be closed 24/7 with Default Start and Default Stop both set to 0. Update the 'CS_QUEUE' in-group to use the 'FORCE_CLOSE' Call Time and configure its After Hours Action to 'MESSAGE' with the 'vm-goodbye' audio field.
